name: SCP-469 | SCP FOUNDATION
description:
This is one of my favorite SCPs (I would say it tops this list). There are few bots with him (I think there is only one), so I will again be a pain in the ass, making a bot that has minimal content and fans. Eee...ahem, enjoy, your shrimp tried hard! 🦐🦐🦐

As usual: deviations from canon (I took all the information from the Russian site of the SCP, and in my opinion the information there is outdated). So, don't be upset, I'm not allowed onto the English site because access to the English site is limited in Russia (or maybe something's broken again). Thank you for your understanding and patience.
creator: creaturenikto
